programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mark, from Kent, has a lifelong love of Italy. Having recently retired, he's set his sights on finding a holiday bolthole in its Puglia region to escape to at various times of the year. With best friend John also on hand to lend his support, Mark would love to find a three-bedroom townhouse. Property expert Laura Hamilton also helps him deliver his dream on an £80,000 budget

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Seán gets into deep water with his Apollo Beach fishing charter sideline. Charmaine runs a multimillion-pound business from her Miami bedroom while homeschooling her daughter, and outside Orlando, Gary and Maria are expecting more grandchildren

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Half-built walls and a ticking clock haunt Sophie and Ray at Château des Fouilloux. A massive water leak forces Stephanie into a full kitchen rebuild at Château de Lalande. And in Occitania, happily ever after seems a long way off for Janet and Philip

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Sharon and Shaun Garner channel a higher power as they hope to lead reiki master Cathy to her ideal property in Almería. Former angler Kevin and his wife Lynne are keen to net a retirement home in Málaga with the help of Shani and Andrew Hamilton. Away from the office, Sharon and Shaun take part in a five-kilometre charity dog walk

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search for properties in Wales, with one couple who crossed the world to live there and another who have always called it home. Tish and Ramone moved to the country from Cape Town and now they consider it their adopted home. It's Kirstie's job to find them a dream place that's both full of period charm and low maintenance. Phil is with Gemma and Ellis who are Welsh born and bred, but even with their local knowledge they are finding it difficult to get a future family home in Newport

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: After her bold declaration, Anna attempts to adjust to the new path she has chosen but comes face to face with those from her past who disapprove. Meanwhile, as gossip spreads throughout the community, David tries to ignore the noise. But he clashes with the bishop and demons from his past threaten to rear their heads. Drama, starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu

programme.title: Marilyn and the Mob
programme.desc: First in a two-documentary tracing Marilyn Monroe's rise from a troubled childhood to Hollywood superstardom, and focusing on how the entertainment industry she idolised was deeply entwined with organised crime. As Marilyn's star rose, she became involved with Hollywood figures tied to the underworld, including Frank Sinatra, Johnny Roselli, and Sam Giancana. Her romance with the debonair and politically connected star Peter Lawford brought her into the orbit of John F Kennedy and Robert F Kennedy, where Hollywood, crime and politics merged

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their thoughts on Prisoner, David Attenborough's 100 Years on Planet Earth, Countdown, First Dates, Scam Interceptors and news reports about the local elections and Keir Starmer

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox and Professor David Wilson investigate the 1993 murder of 42-year-old Bulic Forsythe, a manager at Lambeth Council, who was savagely beaten in his own home in Clapham, London, before the property was set ablaze

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.title: The Last Tree (2019)
programme.desc: A British boy of Nigerian heritage enjoys a happy childhood with his foster mother in rural Lincolnshire, but his life is thrown into upheaval when he is returned to his biological mother, and uprooted to the unfamiliar world of inner city London. Drama, starring Samuel Adewunmi and Gbemisola Ikumelo

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Sahar Zand reports from the Philippines on the controversial world of spiritual healers. Across the country, with high medical costs and difficulties accessing healthcare, patients put their trust in alternative treatments to cure anything from chronic pain to cancer. Faith healers, blending Catholic rituals with centuries-old traditions, promise miraculous recoveries through prayer, herbal remedies and psychic surgery. Their clinics attract patients from across this country of 112 million people, and even overseas. Sahar meets families placing their hopes in these treatments, including those who've turned away from conventional medicine. Some say they've witnessed extraordinary recoveries, crediting healers with saving their lives. On the outskirts of Manilla, three faith healers who claim to treat over 100 people per week believe they've been divinely chosen to cure conditions modern medicine can't detect. But critics warn that the industry is dangerously unregulated. Medical professionals fear that patients are being misled, delaying vital treatment, often fatally. She hears from people who believe that their loved ones paid the ultimate price for putting their trust in miracle cures that they now believe were a scam. With faith healers operating across the country, authorities face mounting pressure to act, but regulation remains limited in a country where faith runs deep

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect visits a futuristic home designed to save space, with a double bed rising into the ceiling to reveal the living area beneath, and the kitchen and bathroom cleverly hidden from view. Inspired by these ideas, George and William make progress with their tree house, showing that by folding everything into the walls it is possible to fit all the rooms into a small space. He also meets a couple who are building the ultimate wilderness beach hut

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Jodie wants to start a small horse livery business and also explores how to start up a kids' club on her family's smallholding. Sarah Beeny follows her progress

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Lucy Porter joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane finalise their wedding plans, but regulars at the bar still have reservations about the proposed nuptials. As the couple prepare to exchange their vows, Professor Sumner Sloan shows up to reveal a publisher is interested in one of Diane's manuscripts - if she is willing to leave with him immediately to start rewrites

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's round-the-world sailing jaunt is cut short by a sunken ship, forcing him to return to the bar. However, his chances of getting his old job back are soon ruined by new manager Rebecca. Kirstie Alley makes her debut in the sitcom

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam agrees to fill in for a local sports broadcaster, thinking the job will be a breeze, but finds out the hard way it is not as easy as it looks. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part one of three. Marie gives Debra the silent treatment for being rude to her, so Ray talks the pair into making amends - but as usual in the Barone household, his efforts backfire. Starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of three. Marie and Debra's feud continues, so Ray and Frank use it to their advantage, while Robert tries to get the warring pair to make friends. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra accuses Ray of still not being able to read her moods, prompting them to reminisce fondly about the first night they spent together. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin makes friends with reclusive author TH Houghton, to the considerable dismay of Niles and Frasier, who are frustrated that their own attempts to strike up an acquaintance have failed dismally. Comedy, guest starring Robert Prosky (Hill Street Blues), with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles hits the airwaves as a stand-in during Frasier's absence from his radio show, but gets more than he bargained for thanks to a star basketball player. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne is dumped by her boyfriend and causes bemusement in the Crane household by immediately embarking on a new relationship - with a man who looks, dresses, talks and acts exactly like Niles. Comedy, starring Jane Leeves and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith and Frasier are forced to spend time together while trying to convince the headmaster of an exclusive Boston school that their precocious son Frederick would be the ideal pupil. Comedy, guest starring Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppi's in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgia's constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Dumfries to meet recently retired Mary, who is looking to downsize. Items uncovered include a horse trap and a broken one-arm bandit

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The owners of a village in France host the local council at their restaurant, while a couple from Norwich spend their first Christmas in their hamlet. Meanwhile, in Spain, the very first guests arrive at a cave village in Andalucía

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Lucy Porter joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth assists retirees Steve and Jackie from Oxfordshire, who want to find a holiday home in Guardamar del Segura, south-east Spain, that they can enjoy with their family and friends. Lee showcases five attractive properties within their budget of £80,000

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Scottish ranch owners Laura, Diane and Huey are staging a vow renewal ceremony at their wedding venue in Groveland, but their efforts to decorate for the occasion are hampered by the extreme heat of Florida's summer. Laura has the reception meal to cook, but she also needs to prioritise the health of a horse that's in danger of losing an eye. In Orlando, actor and singer Sarah has swapped London's West End for the love of a good Floridian undertaker. But, away from the family funeral parlour, she runs a performing arts school and needs to transform her living room into a cabaret club to stage an important charity gig. Over on the Gulf Coast, in Clearwater Beach, Yorkshire grandfather and bar manager Gary is on dolphin watch, working his second job as a tour guide to build a better future for his growing family

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: After a major flood at Château de Lalande, Stephanie needs to complete a full kitchen refurb before a house full of guests descend for her 50th birthday extravaganza. Near Cognac, Bart and Sarah rush to complete a bathroom for their best friends' wedding. Near the Pyrenees, sustainability champion Trish rescues battery hens and plans to build them a château of their own, complete with roosting rooms

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Documentary following families who have set up shop in Spain selling properties to fellow Brits. In Alicante, Charlotte and Damon line up three properties for Sonia and Chris, who are looking for a family holiday home, on a challenging budget in the face of rising property prices

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Yorkshire by the Sea
programme.desc: Whitby distillers Jess and Luke are creating their latest tipple from tasty foraged seaside ingredients. In Scarborough, pioneering sea-farmer Wave checks out his seaweed harvest of sugar kelp, while newbie hoteliers Steph and Luke prepare for the busiest weekend of the summer season. Down the coast in Filey, military vehicle restorer Duncan preps his Second World War American Jeep for parade duty

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Armando Iannucci and Joanna Page contemplate an alien invasion, Joel Dommett joyfully slides socks onto cacti, Kumail Nanjiani is enchanted by smoky bubbles, and Amy Gledhill performs stand-up using items of clothing. Meanwhile, Greg Davies proves that he's a responsible master of his loveable pet, Little Alex Horne

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy game show, with Richard Ayoade and Harriet Dyer taking on Bob Mortimer and Tom Allen. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate, Joe Wilkinson drops in and Ian Smith joins Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: TFI Friday Unplugged
programme.desc: Chris Evans brings his entertainment show back to Channel 4 in a more intimate format, featuring interviews with the biggest stars and music by the latest bands from the presenter's studio at Virgin Radio UK

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: Jason begins to lower his guard as he commits to individual therapy with Aisha. Ellen continues to flourish with surrogate partner therapist Kat, building confidence and emotional connection as she edges closer to a major personal breakthrough. Alex and Joy's relationship takes a significant step forward, as they become the first couple to spend private time together on the island

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The retreat enters its final phase. Bertie progresses to the bedroom with surrogate-partner therapist Kat and learns the lesson of a lifetime. Katie and Callum's romance intensifies as they choose to spend time alone together. Marianne faces her final sessions with surrogate partner Andre. Has she finally overcome her mistrust of men and is she now ready to go all the way with intimacy?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits PJ's Steakhouse in Queens, New York, to provide his expert advice to the owners. They decided to turn a successful bar into a high-end restaurant, but without any previous experience in managing a business they found themselves seriously in debt. With an over-confident chef and a partner propping up the bar, co-owner Madalyn faces a few difficult decisions

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples battle it out to host the best dinner party in Newcastle. Partners Fiona and Hannah kick things off with their Moroccan-themed menu. Couple David and Sonia, and childhood sweethearts Claire and Steven, all agree the puppet show was unexpected. Day two sees Steven and Claire's German-inspired menu. Finally, David decides a charm offensive is needed for his and Sonia's night

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox and Professor David Wilson investigate the 1993 murder of 42-year-old Bulic Forsythe, a manager at Lambeth Council, who was savagely beaten in his own home in Clapham, London, before the property was set ablaze

programme.title: Wonders of the World I Can't See
programme.desc: Chris McCausland and Liza Tarbuck head to Canada to experience the majestic natural marvel that is Niagara Falls. It's the only wonder in the series that makes a noise, so Chris is especially excited to be here. The pair explore the wider Canadian cultural landscape of axe throwing, bushcraft and poutine before heading into the heart of the falls for an emotional final experience

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi is joined by comedian and author Rosie Jones for a journey round the Midlands exploring the best staycation retreats they have to offer. The pair begin in Rutland where they stay at the Rocket Lodge, an eco-build made of upcycled grain silos that boasts a wood-fired hot-tub, a circular kitchen and a disco bathroom. In the sand dunes on a strip of the Lincolnshire coastline, the duo stay in a rebooted 70s beach house called Sandy Feet where Sandi learns that 'Netflix and chill' doesn't mean what she thinks it does. They end their trip close to the Welsh border on the Walcot Estate in a 200-year-old hideaway known as the Wheelwright's shop that once lived 20 miles away but was dismantled and transported piece by piece before being rebuilt to look exactly the same

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Blackburn compete to put on the best dinner party, with a halibut starter served in tinfoil, an eager-to-please pair of hosts, and a relaxed curry dinner

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: James and Jodie find out how to make their 17th-century farmhouse watertight while Emma and James take two alpacas paddling at the beach

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Lucy Porter joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm gets a new job with a prestigious Boston accountancy firm, but the position is not quite as glamorous as he leads people to believe. Meanwhile, Cliff finds some money

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The gang makes a home movie chronicling an average day at Cheers in a bid to reassure a nervous Mr and Mrs Boyd back in Indiana that Woody has wonderful friends in Boston. Comedy, guest starring Doris Grau and Al Rosen

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: A House Is Not a Home
programme.desc: Sam and Diane buy the house they've always dreamed of, but their happiness is cut short when they begin to feel sorry for the previous owners. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray steels himself for the delicate matter of telling Ally where babies come from - only to learn she is more interested in discussing the meaning of life itself. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra runs for school president, but Ray decides to vote against her to avoid looking after the twins during all the meetings she would have to attend. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tries to create a sense of affection and familiarity by addressing Marie as 'mom' - but the gesture backfires badly and offends her real mother, who finds it inappropriate

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne tries to avoid returning to England to visit her family, while Frasier is given a recording of his first radio broadcast in Seattle. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne's ex-fiance Clive visits Seattle to declare his undying love and ask her to marry him. Rather than saying she cannot see a future for them, she decides to let him down gently and pretends to be Niles's wife. With David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz talks Frasier into going on a blind date with one of her friends - but Bulldog ends up falling in love with her. Meanwhile, a spelling mistake in an advert causes trouble for Niles, and Daphne accidentally destroys Martin's favourite shoes. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Dan Butler

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A recurring dream makes Frasier wonder whether he is gay, prompting him to search for an explanation of its meaning - with a little help from Niles. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In this revisit episode, chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Mojito, the Junction (formerly known as Flamangos) and Bazzini to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Gemma Longworth are in Northern Ireland to meet Dave, whose workshop turns out to be a treasure trove including a church pew and a ladder that becomes a wardrobe

programme.title: Marilyn and the Mob

programme.desc: After a major flood at Château de Lalande, Stephanie needs to complete a full kitchen refurb before a house full of guests descend for her 50th birthday extravaganza. Near Cognac, Bart and Sarah rush to complete a bathroom for their best friends' wedding. Near the Pyrenees, sustainability champion Trish rescues battery hens and plans to build them a château of their own, complete with roosting rooms

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Documentary following families who have set up shop in Spain selling properties to fellow Brits. In Alicante, Charlotte and Damon line up three properties for Sonia and Chris, who are looking for a family holiday home, on a challenging budget in the face of rising property prices

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Yorkshire by the Sea
programme.desc: Whitby distillers Jess and Luke are creating their latest tipple from tasty foraged seaside ingredients. In Scarborough, pioneering sea-farmer Wave checks out his seaweed harvest of sugar kelp, while newbie hoteliers Steph and Luke prepare for the busiest weekend of the summer season. Down the coast in Filey, military vehicle restorer Duncan preps his Second World War American Jeep for parade duty

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Armando Iannucci and Joanna Page contemplate an alien invasion, Joel Dommett joyfully slides socks onto cacti, Kumail Nanjiani is enchanted by smoky bubbles, and Amy Gledhill performs stand-up using items of clothing. Has she finally overcome her mistrust of men and is she now ready to go all the way with intimacy?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits PJ's Steakhouse in Queens, New York, to provide his expert advice to the owners. They decided to turn a successful bar into a high-end restaurant, but without any previous experience in managing a business they found themselves seriously in debt. With an over-confident chef and a partner propping up the bar, co-owner Madalyn faces a few difficult decisions

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples battle it out to host the best dinner party in Newcastle. Partners Fiona and Hannah kick things off with their Moroccan-themed menu. Couple David and Sonia, and childhood sweethearts Claire and Steven, all agree the puppet show was unexpected. Day two sees Steven and Claire's German-inspired menu. Finally, David decides a charm offensive is needed for his and Sonia's night

programme.sub-title: Citroën Van, Railway Station and Double Decker
programme.desc: The architect boards a double-decker bus that has been converted into a posh restaurant and bar, meets the people living in an old railway station, and examines the next generation of beach huts. He also talks to a French couple bringing a touch of haute cuisine to West Yorkshire, and comes up with a radical idea he hopes will open his tree house to the elements

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank puts salt on Marie's home-made lasagne, causing her to think she is turning into a terrible cook, but Ray and Robert discover their father has lost his sense of taste - apparently because of a potency medication he is taking. programme.desc: Amy chats non-stop through a basketball game, and Ray responds by suggesting to Robert that she talks too much - a criticism she does not take well. Comedy, starring Monica Horan and Ray Romano

programme.desc: Walsh Senior and Junior embark on another challenge-filled road trip and this time they are in for a real culture shock as they head to Latin America. The next day they are in for a fright when they visit an eerie island inhabited by creepy, decrepit dolls - but something far more scary is waiting for them when they find themselves clinging to the side of a mountain

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

They also have fun at a waterpark before joining the cast of Cirque du Soleil

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Bradley is on the mend following his rodeo injury and determined to get back behind the wheel of the RV. As the pair continue on their journey, Barney is thrilled to be celebrating his birthday with a trip to the iconic Niagara Falls. Later, Bradley and Barney take the RV on a small cargo ferry as they head to Vermont. Here, the pair have a go at ice climbing, which proves treacherous for them and the crew, before a spot of dog sledding through the frozen wilderness and an inevitable race through the forests

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: On the final leg of their journey, the pair continue through the snow to New Hampshire. Here, they meet rally-driving champion Tim O'Neil who gives them a crash course in driving in the ice and snow before they take on an intense time trial. The pair travel on to Maine, where they take part in some wilderness training, before bidding farewell to the RV and heading out into the extremely choppy seas for some lobster fishing. Before heading home, the pair look back on some of their favourite moments from the trip

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Baby on the Bus

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Finds Out

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is unsure whether to start a romance with Rachel, so he draws up a list of her good and bad points, then looks on in horror as she accidentally sees the offending document. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Walsh Senior and Junior embark on another challenge-filled road trip and this time they are in for a real culture shock as they head to Latin America. They start out in Mexico, where they grapple with one of the country's most famous sports - lucha libre wrestling. The next day they are in for a fright when they visit an eerie island inhabited by creepy, decrepit dolls - but something far more scary is waiting for them when they find themselves clinging to the side of a mountain

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The Walshes are still in Mexico and still on the side of a mountain. Can they complete the final part of the challenge, which requires Bradley to swing across the top of the mountain with nothing but a terrifying drop below him? Once recovered, the father and son head toward Mexico's coast, where Barney takes his dad inside a pitch-black cave that's home to snakes and thousands of bats. They also have fun at a waterpark before joining the cast of Cirque du Soleil

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian welcomes guests Kylie Minogue and Bradley Walsh for an evening of entertainment at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. programme.desc: Gloria panics when Joe is deemed too aggressive for gym class, leading her to worry that he has inherited a family curse, and Cam spins Lily a little white lie about her missing cat, only for it to spiral out of control. Phil taps into a rich new vein of clients - recently divorced women - but are they more trouble than they're worth? American comedy, starring Sofia Vergara, Eric Stonestreet and Ty Burrell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apu has the bright idea of turning the Kwik-E-Mart into a novel money-spinning tourist attraction, while Lisa is struck by the awful thought that her genetic make-up means she will follow in her family's footsteps and end up stupid

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is horrified at Marge's attempts to make him befriend Ralph Wiggum - until he learns his police chief dad has a master key to every shop in Springfield. In a bid to impress Nelson and his bully buddies, Bart and Ralph break into an abandoned prison, where they find an electric chair

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart decides he wants a little brother, and unofficially adopts a youngster named Charlie from the local orphanage - much to the dismay of Lisa. With the guest voices of Kim Cattrall (Sex and the City) and American Football stars Peyton and Eli Manning

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: During a trip to a water park with the family, Grampa bumps into a newspaper columnist who seemingly becomes fascinated with his life and writes a series of stories about him, but Homer becomes suspicious of the journalist's motives

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake makes an arrest without much proof, and so has to spend the next 48 hours collecting enough evidence to keep his suspect in custody. While his co-workers are forced to help him out over the weekend, Charles judges a pie contest between Rosa and Gina, and the Captain gives advice to Terry, who has a problem involving his brother-in-law. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's dreams come true when he gets the chance to spend the day with his hero, veteran crime reporter Jimmy Brogan, but their encounter has unexpected consequences. Meanwhile, Terry and Charles prepare Rosa for a day in court, teaching her to be less terrifying on the witness stand. Guest starring Stacy Keach

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The adults take a trip to Las Vegas, where Jay wheels and deals to get them some better rooms - including their very own British butler, played by Stephen Merchant. Phil spends most of his time with his magician heroes - neglecting Claire in the process - and Mitch runs into an ex-boyfriend he dumped by e-mail, although it all seems fine when he invites Mitch and Cam to his bachelor party

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Plans for a relaxed evening at Jay's turn out to be anything but when Claire is mad with her dad over his lack of gratitude for her holding the fort at work and Mitchell is busy scheming after receiving a gift he doesn't like. Meanwhile, Phil and Gloria stop off at her old salon and get scissor-happy when a stylist fails to show up

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Pritchetts head Down Under for a family holiday so Phil can fulfil his mother's wish that he should one day return to the country where he was conceived. Mitch and Cam meet up with an old friend who is now a big star, but neither of them can stand him, while Jay and Claire let work eat into their vacation time. Rhys Darby (Flight of the Conchords) guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The gang members get together to have their family photo taken, with Gloria on hand to organise everyone. and Phil tracks down the record he lost his virginity to, but soon regrets it when it makes him feel as if he's being unfaithful to Claire. She, meanwhile, accuses Cameron of being a snob when he refuses her daughter's hand-me-downs, and Jay enters Stella into a dog show

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Dad Who Knew Too Little
programme.desc: Homer realises he knows very little about Lisa and tries to fill the gaps in his knowledge by hiring a dodgy private detective to spy on her - only to end up on the wrong side of the law. With the guest voice of Elliott Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer takes Ned Flanders' advice and starts praying regularly, hoping God will lend a sympathetic ear and make it possible for him to buy a better home. Marge warns that his materialistic attitude may incur divine retribution, but he turns a deaf ear - until a flood of biblical proportions hits Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart learns that he was once a child celebrity, but that Homer spent all the money he made, so he separates from his parents and moves into a loft apartment, where his neighbours are punk band Blink-182 and skateboarding hero Tony Hawk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I'm Spelling as Fast as I Can
programme.desc: Homer develops a ravenous appetite for Krustyburger's new spare rib sandwich, while Lisa is offered a scholarship at the college of her choice - but only if she agrees to deliberately lose a spelling contest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer builds a robot for Bart to enter the Robot Rumble TV show, but finds the task harder than expected and resorts to trickery. Meanwhile, Lisa's pet cats keep dying

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's new snowplough business proves an unexpected success but drives a wedge between him and Barney, who decides to operate a rival service. Featuring the voices of Linda Ronstadt and Adam West

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: One of the brides receives a surprise gift on her honeymoon in Panama. Two other newly-weds struggle to deal with a massive bombshell

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: Dating guru Anna Williamson visits Coleen Nolan at her day job in the Loose Women studios, before sending her on a date with a joker. Lucinda Light goes axe throwing on her second date with bearded Damian. There are bound to be splinters

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Squid Game, Strictly Come Dancing, The Mating Game, Family Fortunes and Boris Johnson's appearance on The Andrew Marr Show, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Science technician Ian has a date with shy nursery nurse Stacie and glamorous 22-year-old dental nurse Cece is looking for someone who can see that beauty is more than skin deep. Aldine, 42, has been engaged five times without ever making it down the aisle and project manager Paul, 38, is looking for a woman with a bit of spirit, but could Aldine be a bit too much for him to handle?

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: Dating guru Anna Williamson visits Coleen Nolan at her day job in the Loose Women studios, before sending her on a date with a joker. Lucinda Light goes axe throwing on her second date with bearded Damian. There are bound to be splinters

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: One of the brides receives a surprise gift on her honeymoon in Panama. Two other newly-weds struggle to deal with a massive bombshell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge goes on the offensive and plans a protest against a combat sport that has captivated Springfield's male population. When promoter Chett Englebrecht hears of her campaign, he challenges her to a fight - and agrees to shut down his entire operation if she beats him

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Sketch tackles Layton's dodgy inking, before turning his attention to an offensive tattoo on Aaron. Elsewhere, Uzzi helps Calvin remember his own strength

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. The answers to a great many questions will be answered in this episode. Will Steve Pemberton's no-vowels gamble pay off? Why does Sophie Willan love to balance items on her head? Can John Robins make formula milk? What does Nick Mohammed think is going to happen to those eggs? And, most intriguingly, why is Joanne McNally sniffing Little Alex Horne's beard? Taskmaster Greg Davies reacts with characteristic robustness to the cast's efforts to impress him

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock is joined by Liza Tarbuck to battle guest captain Sarah Millican and team-mate Romesh Ranganathan as Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel quiz show mash-up. Susie Dent is ably assisted by Phill Jupitus in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley deals with the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steven Newman, CEO of department store chain Loehmann's, views his company from a different perspective when he goes undercover as an aspiring entrepreneur visiting the shops after winning a reality TV contest. And that's when he learns first-hand that the employees are the foundation of the company

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jane Grote Abell, the Chairwoman of Donatos Pizza and daughter of the company's founder, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win money to open her own restaurant. Her aim is to uncover where the company is going, what plans for the future should include and whether her father's values are still being upheld

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros' hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs? Can Jonathan's craftmanship plus Drew's expertise equal a smooth house sale? Short: Since the school zone changed their boundaries, Julie, Jason and their kids have no choice but to move. Can Jonathan's craftmanship plus Drew's expertise equal a smooth house sale?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Husband and wife Dave and Pam kick off the competition in Gloucestershire with a farmhouse menu, as they compete against Alettia and Stuart, and Jake and Helen for the cash prize

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Leeds, giggle monsters Gemma and Ryan kick off the competition with a menu designed to show off their fun side. Couple Jonathan and Keith put on a classic 1970s menu on the second evening, while on the last night, music-loviers Nigel and Yvonne hope their Yorkshire twist will hit the right note

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: After 11 months together 28-year-old trainee social worker Hywel proposed spontaneously to girlfriend Beca at a Blur gig. Now he intends to create a music festival-themed wedding for his fiancee in Bridgend, south Wales. However, the grim weather seems set to to ruin their big day

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: Don't Tell the Bride - Best of Bride
programme.desc: EastEnders actress Patsy Palmer presents a countdown of the top 20 surprising highlights from the series in which a groom-to-be is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee the wedding of her dreams, while she relinquishes control of her big day

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Joe DiDomizio, CEO of travel retailer Hudson Group, goes undercover to ensure the company is fighting fit for the future. The businessman hopes to find that the company's vow to be 'the traveller's best friend' is being upheld by his employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Miller, CEO of the Larry H Miller Group of Companies and co-owner of National Basketball Association team the Utah Jazz, goes undercover. Since his father died he has made many changes to the organisation, and posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition to win a dream job, he works among his own staff to see if his dad's legacy still lives on

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? After beating cancer, Jennifer and her family are determined to live life to the fullest. Can Jonathan and Drew help them by finding a dream home with easy access to the great outdoors?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Married couple Lynne and Ian kick off the competition in Gateshead, Tyne and Wear, with a menu of hearty treats. On day two newlyweds Jess and Connor cook up a Greek meal - including a rather large mezze - followed by a Greek dance and some plate smashing. After two high-energy dinner parties, engaged couple Tom and Sam's chances rest on their banana souffle

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. Greg's loyal valet Alex Horne watches on as Joanne McNally demonstrates a traditional Irish handshake, John Robins reveals a love of pickled onions, and Nick Mohammed sparks controversy with a cardboard tube

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: The Inbetweeners

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon goes to his first gig since seeing Take That at Wembley Arena, hoping to impress an attractive girl in the year below, but Will, Jay and Neil tag along and jeopardise his chances of wooing her. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

Loved-up couple Rob and Jade are impressed with the posh nosh, but married childhood sweethearts Caroline and Tony can't get Mike's resemblance to a famous comedian out of their minds. Rob and Jade put together a Thai-inspired menu, but Mike and Helenor are suspicious of Rob's story of why he loves Thai food. On the last night, visually impaired Caroline and her easy-going husband Tony hope their made-from-scratch food will secure the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Red and his partner Bozey kick off the competition in south Wales with a Welsh menu. Estate agents 'Princess' Trish and her partner Alan cook a glamorous fine-dining menu on the seond night. Alan is a real romantic and he tells his guests how far he will go to show his love for Trish, revealing his tattoos of devotion. Finally, fiancés Marc and Dan put on a musical-themed feast, hoping Marc's nana's egg sauce, which has been passed down through generations, will be enough to win them the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: An update episode, contemplating whether the brides featured in the fourth series got the dream weddings they deserved. Here, the girls have their say

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The show heads to Kirkintilloch on the outskirts of Glasgow to visit a couple who met at a party at the town's miners' club. The would-be bride grew up in the city's fashionable West End, and dreams of a glamorous wedding day. However, the groom-to-be is a local boy whose idea of a perfect reception consists of drinks at his favourite pub

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Former participants Amit Kleinberger, Randy DeWitt and Steve Greenbaum want to take another look at the everyday workings of their businesses, but fear they will be recognised. They each send an employee in their place to report on how their firms are functioning

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Platt, the president and CEO of entertainment and fitness business Sky Zone, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win an action-adventure holiday. He aims to discover whether his fast-growing company is running as smoothly and efficiently as possible, but his secret identity is jeopardised when he encounters a colleague he has met on a previous occasion

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Belfast, three couples compete to host the best dinner party. Sarah and Paddy kick things off with a fine-dining feast for guests Louise and Danny and Emma and Samson. The hosts mix Eastern and traditional fare. Then, on night two Emma and Samson treat their guests to some Mozambican delights. After a first course that whistles and wows, palates need to be cleansed for the main course, but a chilly chat about ice-cream leaves Louise red in the face. On the final night, Louise and Danny confound everyone's expectations with a sailing-based starter. A spot of model behaviour excites the guests, and a mountain of meringue impresses, but is it enough to win the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped

programme.title: The Inbetweeners

Comedy, starring Joe Thomas and Hannah Tointon

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons include political activist Lettie, who is 23 and looking for her intellectual equal, but despite being clued-up on politics, she is clueless on love. programme.title: Celebs Go Dating

programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding
programme.desc: Four more singles prepare to meet their matches at the altar, but it's not the first time some of them have said 'I do'. The two couples who've already tied the knot spend their first night together

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly learns that the complicated world of adult relationships is filled with minefields when she opens her mind to dating. And Barry discovers a new passion

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam let their competitive sides get the better of them when Lily starts gymnastics. Meanwhile, Phil takes the family on a road trip up the coast in his new motor home - much to Claire's dismay. Plus, Jay and Gloria enjoy a fruitful snooping session while searching for Manny's missing backpack. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam make a big decision, Phil and Claire try to squeeze in some time alone, while Jay and Gloria prepare for Manny's solo trip to Colombia to visit relatives

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty's ancient jokes and politically incorrect impressions go down like a lead balloon at a charity comedy festival - so he decides to spice up his act by adding more alternative, adult-oriented material. Featuring the guest voice of chat show host Jay Leno, alongside comedians Steven Wright and Janeane Garofalo

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe desperately wants to raise cash to lavish on his new girlfriend, so Homer rashly agrees to help him defraud his car insurance company - but his bumbling attempts to destroy the vehicle put him behind bars. Featuring the guest voice of Helen Hunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge poses for a charity calendar and becomes Springfield's number-one sex symbol, while Carl gets a promotion at the plant, before going on a power trip and hiring Homer as his new assistant

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa accepts an invitation to join a Wiccan coven - but before she can be initiated, Chief Wiggum arrives and arrests the other members on charges of witchcraft. Meanwhile, Homer befriends local hillbilly Cletus, eager to share his plentiful supply of illegal moonshine liquor

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cops of the 99th Precinct become the latest victim of the Vulture, a detective from Major Crimes with a habit of taking over investigations just as they are about to be solved. However, Jake is determined not to let the hotshot steal his thunder and races to close his case first. Meanwhile, Holt and Gina help Terry regain his right to carry a gun

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct's staff prepare for an unusually busy night as the neighbourhood gets into the Halloween spirit, and Amy falls into a particularly foul mood when she is forced to wear a fancy-dress costume during an undercover operation. Meanwhile, Jake bets Captain Holt that he can steal his Medal of Valour before midnight - a challenge that prompts him to don his own selection of disguises

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire thinks Luke is up to no good with his friends, so she persuades a reluctant Phil into helping her spy on their son. Gloria is suspicious of Jay when he starts moaning amorously in his sleep and Mitch struggles to keep a secret from Cam

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil, Jay and Luke wage war against three generations of Thorpes, including Phil's arch- rival Gil. Mitch and Cam ask Claire to collect Lily from school - but forget to mention the outbreak of head lice - and Gloria chaperones a field trip, giving her cause to worry about Manny's lack of self-confidence

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam is mightily annoyed after organising the school's most successful fundraiser, only for Spanish teacher Senor Kaplan to steal his thunder. Husband-to-be Mitchell, on the other hand, can't make up his mind about his old college pal Wendy, who is now his new boss, and Phil wants to impress daughter Haley, who has agreed to accompany him to the annual real estate banquet

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A day at the museum proves to be anything but fun when Cam, Mitch and Manny realise they can't hold their own against brainbox Alex. Claire is less than enthusiastic when she and Gloria go shopping to buy a dress for Lily, while Jay imparts some manly pearls of wisdom to grandson Luke

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge has plastic surgery in an effort to lose weight, but a mix-up results in her being given breast implants instead - much to Homer's delight. With the guest voices of Adam West and Burt Ward, stars of 1960s TV series Batman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family takes part in a new reality TV show set in the 19th century, which proves unpopular with viewers, prompting the producers to try a series of increasingly desperate and dangerous ploys in a bid to boost ratings. With the guest voice of former boxer Larry Holmes

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is the target of a mysterious murder attempt at a sauna, so Chief Wiggum orders Sideshow Bob's early release from prison to help identify the culprit. Featuring the guest voice of Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart takes pity on Mrs Krabappel and nominates her for the prestigious Teacher of the Year competition held in Florida, making Principal Skinner fear she will find another job if she wins. With the guest voice of Little Richard

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren remains determined to show Mercedes that Jenson isn't who she thinks he is. Dripping in aftershave, Prince goes round to the Maaliks to see Vicky. A spiralling Nancy tears a strip off Maddox in the village after overhearing him talk about her family to Ant - Beth and Jonah intervene

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart develops a crush on babysitter Laura Powers and plots to break up her relationship with bullying boyfriend Jimbo Jones - but things do not turn out as planned. Featuring the voice of Sara Gilbert (Roseanne, The Big Bang Theory)

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: Wedding bells ring for the final couple in the experiment, before all five sets of newly-weds jet off to Panama for their honeymoons

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including SAS: Who Dares Wins, Bridgerton, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, The 1% Club, Get Organized with the Home Edit, Made in Chelsea. Plus ITV news coverage of Rishi Sunak and the BBC's coverage of 'Partygate' fines

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.sub-title: Best Naughty Bits: The Good, the Bad and the Kinky
programme.desc: Another romp through the Naked Attraction archive, this time focusing on the people doing the choosing - from those that it seemed butter would not melt to the ones who revealed their darkest secrets. Highlights include the polyamorous couple picking a date to the time the bodies were covered in whipped cream, strawberries and custard

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Science technician Ian has a date with shy nursery nurse Stacie and glamorous 22-year-old dental nurse Cece is looking for someone who can see that beauty is more than skin deep. Aldine, 42, has been engaged five times without ever making it down the aisle and project manager Paul, 38, is looking for a woman with a bit of spirit, but could Aldine be a bit too much for him to handle?

programme.desc: Wedding bells ring for the final couple in the experiment, before all five sets of newly-weds jet off to Panama for their honeymoons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is cast in the title role of Everyman, a superhero movie penned by Comic Book Guy, but struggles with the exercise and diet regimen required to get in shape for the part. With the guest voice of Seth Rogen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart plays a prank on Mrs Krabappel, but it backfires badly and results in her being fired, leaving him feeling so guilty that he resolves to do everything he can to get her reinstated - even if it means discrediting her replacement

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is at a crossroads about her future, so she draws inspiration from Baby Boom and crafts a plan to 'have it all'. Adam remakes the Uptown Girl music video

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Things are finally working out for Adam, until he receives a letter from NYU that could change everything, while Barry hears that the JTP have other friends outside the crew

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Impulsive groom Steve plans a cliff-hanger of a Wild West wedding, but demanding bride-to-be Leona dreams of a more sophisticated do

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to get hold of the year's must-have gadget for Phil's birthday. Cam gets involved in a neighbour's marital problems, while Mitchell decides it is time to toughen up. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen, Ty Burrell, Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny's hot-tempered basketball coach quits, causing Jay and Phil to compete for the position. Elsewhere, Mitchell introduces Cameron to a prospective employer. Comedy, starring Nolan Gould, Rico Rodriguez, Ed O'Neill and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples battle it out to host the best dinner party in Newcastle. Partners Fiona and Hannah kick things off with their Moroccan-themed menu. Couple David and Sonia, and childhood sweethearts Claire and Steven, all agree the puppet show was unexpected. Day two sees Steven and Claire's German-inspired menu. Finally, David decides a charm offensive is needed for his and Sonia's night

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makis's reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: Wedding bells ring for the final couple in the experiment, before all five sets of newly-weds jet off to Panama for their honeymoons

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Nerves jangle as Luke and Manny face their first day at high school. Cam takes on a substitute gig, leaving Mitch to look after Lily. American comedy, starring Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria panics when Joe is deemed too aggressive for gym class, leading her to worry that he has inherited a family curse, and Cam spins Lily a little white lie about her missing cat, only for it to spiral out of control. Phil taps into a rich new vein of clients - recently divorced women - but are they more trouble than they're worth? American comedy, starring Sofia Vergara, Eric Stonestreet and Ty Burrell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apu has the bright idea of turning the Kwik-E-Mart into a novel money-spinning tourist attraction, while Lisa is struck by the awful thought that her genetic make-up means she will follow in her family's footsteps and end up stupid

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is horrified at Marge's attempts to make him befriend Ralph Wiggum - until he learns his police chief dad has a master key to every shop in Springfield. In a bid to impress Nelson and his bully buddies, Bart and Ralph break into an abandoned prison, where they find an electric chair

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart decides he wants a little brother, and unofficially adopts a youngster named Charlie from the local orphanage - much to the dismay of Lisa. With the guest voices of Kim Cattrall (Sex and the City) and American Football stars Peyton and Eli Manning

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: During a trip to a water park with the family, Grampa bumps into a newspaper columnist who seemingly becomes fascinated with his life and writes a series of stories about him, but Homer becomes suspicious of the journalist's motives

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake makes an arrest without much proof, and so has to spend the next 48 hours collecting enough evidence to keep his suspect in custody. While his co-workers are forced to help him out over the weekend, Charles judges a pie contest between Rosa and Gina, and the Captain gives advice to Terry, who has a problem involving his brother-in-law. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's dreams come true when he gets the chance to spend the day with his hero, veteran crime reporter Jimmy Brogan, but their encounter has unexpected consequences. Meanwhile, Terry and Charles prepare Rosa for a day in court, teaching her to be less terrifying on the witness stand. Guest starring Stacy Keach

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The adults take a trip to Las Vegas, where Jay wheels and deals to get them some better rooms - including their very own British butler, played by Stephen Merchant. Phil spends most of his time with his magician heroes - neglecting Claire in the process - and Mitch runs into an ex-boyfriend he dumped by e-mail, although it all seems fine when he invites Mitch and Cam to his bachelor party

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Plans for a relaxed evening at Jay's turn out to be anything but when Claire is mad with her dad over his lack of gratitude for her holding the fort at work and Mitchell is busy scheming after receiving a gift he doesn't like. Meanwhile, Phil and Gloria stop off at her old salon and get scissor-happy when a stylist fails to show up

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Pritchetts head Down Under for a family holiday so Phil can fulfil his mother's wish that he should one day return to the country where he was conceived. Mitch and Cam meet up with an old friend who is now a big star, but neither of them can stand him, while Jay and Claire let work eat into their vacation time. Rhys Darby (Flight of the Conchords) guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The gang members get together to have their family photo taken, with Gloria on hand to organise everyone. and Phil tracks down the record he lost his virginity to, but soon regrets it when it makes him feel as if he's being unfaithful to Claire. She, meanwhile, accuses Cameron of being a snob when he refuses her daughter's hand-me-downs, and Jay enters Stella into a dog show

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Dad Who Knew Too Little
programme.desc: Homer realises he knows very little about Lisa and tries to fill the gaps in his knowledge by hiring a dodgy private detective to spy on her - only to end up on the wrong side of the law. With the guest voice of Elliott Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer takes Ned Flanders' advice and starts praying regularly, hoping God will lend a sympathetic ear and make it possible for him to buy a better home. Marge warns that his materialistic attitude may incur divine retribution, but he turns a deaf ear - until a flood of biblical proportions hits Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart learns that he was once a child celebrity, but that Homer spent all the money he made, so he separates from his parents and moves into a loft apartment, where his neighbours are punk band Blink-182 and skateboarding hero Tony Hawk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I'm Spelling as Fast as I Can
programme.desc: Homer develops a ravenous appetite for Krustyburger's new spare rib sandwich, while Lisa is offered a scholarship at the college of her choice - but only if she agrees to deliberately lose a spelling contest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer builds a robot for Bart to enter the Robot Rumble TV show, but finds the task harder than expected and resorts to trickery. Meanwhile, Lisa's pet cats keep dying

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's new snowplough business proves an unexpected success but drives a wedge between him and Barney, who decides to operate a rival service. Featuring the voices of Linda Ronstadt and Adam West

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: One of the brides receives a surprise gift on her honeymoon in Panama. Two other newly-weds struggle to deal with a massive bombshell

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: Dating guru Anna Williamson visits Coleen Nolan at her day job in the Loose Women studios, before sending her on a date with a joker. Lucinda Light goes axe throwing on her second date with bearded Damian. There are bound to be splinters

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Squid Game, Strictly Come Dancing, The Mating Game, Family Fortunes and Boris Johnson's appearance on The Andrew Marr Show, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A final romp through the Naked Attraction archive, remembering the times that the pickers got it spot on and chose their perfect date, leading to romance and happy endings. The success stories include Gemma and James, who found love on the show and whose relationship is still going strong

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. Single mum Tracy from Bedfordshire has been out of the dating game since she split with her fiancee three years ago and hopes to find a man who matches her adventurous side, while London sales adviser Matthew, 24, is tired of dating apps and thinks online profiles mean girls never actually see the real him. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: Dating guru Anna Williamson visits Coleen Nolan at her day job in the Loose Women studios, before sending her on a date with a joker. Lucinda Light goes axe throwing on her second date with bearded Damian. There are bound to be splinters

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: One of the brides receives a surprise gift on her honeymoon in Panama. Two other newly-weds struggle to deal with a massive bombshell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge goes on the offensive and plans a protest against a combat sport that has captivated Springfield's male population. When promoter Chett Englebrecht hears of her campaign, he challenges her to a fight - and agrees to shut down his entire operation if she beats him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Dracula, the Wolf Man, the Mummy and Frankenstein's monster gatecrash a Halloween party at 742 Evergreen Terrace. Bart and Lisa plot revenge on their teachers in a Hitchcock-inspired short story, but end up turning on each another

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam takes Beverly to her high-school reunion, he tries to prevent a reality where she winds up with the wrong man

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons include political activist Lettie, who is 23 and looking for her intellectual equal, but despite being clued-up on politics, she is clueless on love. Meanwhile, octogenarian Doreen is not ready to give up on love and wants a man to keep her on her toes. Her date is 86-year-old author James

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: A very hungover David is grilled at the agency about his passionate date with Anthony, and Gabby heads out on the most important date of her journey so far. Lucinda's choices involve magic and vikings, and James' past might be about to catch up with him

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding
programme.desc: Four more singles prepare to meet their matches at the altar, but it's not the first time some of them have said 'I do'. The two couples who've already tied the knot spend their first night together

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: At Pop-Pop's old apartment, Adam discovers an item from the past and realises they have more in common than he thought

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly learns that the complicated world of adult relationships is filled with minefields when she opens her mind to dating. And Barry discovers a new passion

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Harry wants a wedding fit for royalty, but his partner Charlotte is not into airs and graces and is dreaming of something much more low key

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Guilt begins to consume Charlie and he admits to Frankie that he's ready to hand himself in. The morning after Ste and Rex's wedding, Leela finds the Hutchinson teenangers spiralling with Tony absent and she offers them support. Distracting himself from recent events, Tony attempts to fix the broken oven at the Hutch

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: At the police station, Charlie is feeling the pressure as he's pushed for answers on what caused him to be distracted. At the Loft, sick of Jenson and his remarks, Warren gives him money to leave the village. Frankie apologises to Caleb admitting she does like him and plans on doing the right thing

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sheep

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bournemouth, Dorset, PR company owners Jackie and Richard are first to host, putting on a classy evening with a few celebrity names thrown in for good measure. Next, Ross and Hanne stake their claim to the £1,000 prize, before everyone is brought to the farm for Gail and Nigel's evening

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding
programme.desc: Four more singles prepare to meet their matches at the altar, but it's not the first time some of them have said 'I do'. The two couples who've already tied the knot spend their first night together

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam let their competitive sides get the better of them when Lily starts gymnastics. Meanwhile, Phil takes the family on a road trip up the coast in his new motor home - much to Claire's dismay. Plus, Jay and Gloria enjoy a fruitful snooping session while searching for Manny's missing backpack. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam make a big decision, Phil and Claire try to squeeze in some time alone, while Jay and Gloria prepare for Manny's solo trip to Colombia to visit relatives

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty's ancient jokes and politically incorrect impressions go down like a lead balloon at a charity comedy festival - so he decides to spice up his act by adding more alternative, adult-oriented material. Featuring the guest voice of chat show host Jay Leno, alongside comedians Steven Wright and Janeane Garofalo

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe desperately wants to raise cash to lavish on his new girlfriend, so Homer rashly agrees to help him defraud his car insurance company - but his bumbling attempts to destroy the vehicle put him behind bars. Featuring the guest voice of Helen Hunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge poses for a charity calendar and becomes Springfield's number-one sex symbol, while Carl gets a promotion at the plant, before going on a power trip and hiring Homer as his new assistant

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa accepts an invitation to join a Wiccan coven - but before she can be initiated, Chief Wiggum arrives and arrests the other members on charges of witchcraft. Meanwhile, Homer befriends local hillbilly Cletus, eager to share his plentiful supply of illegal moonshine liquor

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cops of the 99th Precinct become the latest victim of the Vulture, a detective from Major Crimes with a habit of taking over investigations just as they are about to be solved. However, Jake is determined not to let the hotshot steal his thunder and races to close his case first. Meanwhile, Holt and Gina help Terry regain his right to carry a gun

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct's staff prepare for an unusually busy night as the neighbourhood gets into the Halloween spirit, and Amy falls into a particularly foul mood when she is forced to wear a fancy-dress costume during an undercover operation. Meanwhile, Jake bets Captain Holt that he can steal his Medal of Valour before midnight - a challenge that prompts him to don his own selection of disguises

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire thinks Luke is up to no good with his friends, so she persuades a reluctant Phil into helping her spy on their son. Gloria is suspicious of Jay when he starts moaning amorously in his sleep and Mitch struggles to keep a secret from Cam
