programme.desc: As Robbie and Cliff try to find a potential buyer, Tom and Grasso level with the Dark Hearts, and Aleah and Lizzie question Peaches' former co-workers. Later, a raid leads Tom to a shocking revelation

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Saxon gets work calls, so Timothy enforces a no-phone rule, Chelsea faces danger after going to town with Rick, and Jaclyn pushes Laurie toward Valentin

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue makes a deal with the devil in the form of a promise to Alamo, and gives a word of warning to Maddy. Cassie gets her first real taste of stardom on the set of LA Nights, and Rue paints Jules a picture of her ideal future

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: As Kendall, Shiv and Roman hone their pitch for investors in Los Angeles, Logan learns of a rival bid. Drama, starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Kendall, Shiv and Roman consider an aggressive move regarding the Matsson deal, Connor tries to make the most of his wedding rehearsal dinner

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: In the midst of preparing for a key operation, Tom questions the loyalty of the members of his task force, while Robbie and Cliff plan for their meeting at the park. Perry searches for answers within the gang and uncovers a shocking truth and Maeve casts doubt on Robbie's exit plan

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.sub-title: The Heart of a Saturday Night
programme.desc: Lewis and Munch investigate a carjacking that led to a three-year-old girl going missing. Gritty police drama, starring Richard Belzer

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britain's grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their son's birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capital's love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the city's first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the city's biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: An outstanding computer genius at a prestigious prep school is found stabbed to death

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: On Pembleton's first case back, he looks into a divorced woman who is found stabbed to death and her 10-year-old twin boys shot in the head

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: I Am Not the Fine Man You Take Me For
programme.desc: While competition for the roles of sheriff and mayor is hotting up, Jane achieves a captive audience the candidates can only dream of. Swearengen receives a cryptic note informing him of another bloody incident at the Gem, but Hurst later makes his intentions known in a more straightforward message. Meanwhile, Andy Cramed pays an unexpected visit to Tolliver. Starring Ian McShane and Robin Weigert

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Emmy award-winner Brian Cox joins the cast as a flamboyant stage promoter on a mission to introduce a modicum of culture to the residents of the gold-rush town. Hearst's long-serving cook also makes an appearance as the Grand Central chef, and Wu returns with news of a soon-to-arrive group of imported workers. Meanwhile, Bullock uncovers the truth about the Gem killings. Cleo King guest stars

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Prince works to secure a key supporter in his bid for the games. Taylor weighs a different kind of cost when old friends get caught in a business crossfire

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Facing political opposition against the Olympic Games, Prince turns to Wendy for help. Meanwhile, Scooter and Wags must work together to help secure the games

programme.title: My Brilliant Friend
programme.desc: Still reeling from her break-up, Elena reconnects with Antonio, who shares the full extent of Nino's betrayals, while tensions run high at Elisa and Marcello's wedding. In Italian

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: As Kendall, Shiv and Roman hone their pitch for investors in Los Angeles, Logan learns of a rival bid. Drama, starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Prince works to secure a key supporter in his bid for the games. Taylor weighs a different kind of cost when old friends get caught in a business crossfire

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Facing political opposition against the Olympic Games, Prince turns to Wendy for help. Meanwhile, Scooter and Wags must work together to help secure the games

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: In the midst of preparing for a key operation, Tom questions the loyalty of the members of his task force, while Robbie and Cliff plan for their meeting at the park. Perry searches for answers within the gang and uncovers a shocking truth and Maeve casts doubt on Robbie's exit plan

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: Tom and his team inch closer to breaking the case with help from an eyewitness, while Perry pays Maeve a visit and Robbie puts his plan in motion. Later, Tom follows a lead that takes him down a dangerous path

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: Amber reunites with her family while Tibor faces his estranged mother, while Olly rejects their plan and contacts the National Crime Unit, leading Pegasus straight to them

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: Psychological warfare begins as Lindy becomes convinced that Les will never find a way to make her big again. When Jackie strikes a deal to give Lindy the credit for her short story, Lulu discovers how the internet can turn someone from hero to villain

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal - and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence - Captain Connelly threatens to hand the case over to Anchorage. Later, Navarro and Danvers separately find a connection between one of the Tsalal men and Annie, prompting the former partners to agree to work the case together

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: An outstanding computer genius at a prestigious prep school is found stabbed to death

programme.title: Ponies
programme.desc: In 1977, two secretaries working at the US embassy in Moscow volunteer to be operatives after their CIA agent husbands die under mysterious circumstances. Thrown together by grief and circumstance, Bea Grant and Twila Hasbec dig into the vast conspiracy their husbands were killed for. Spy thriller, starring Emilia Clarke and Haley Lu Richardson.

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Comedy drama, starring Jean Smart as Las Vegas comedian Deborah Vance and Hannah Einbinder as her smart young writer Ava

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: Tom and his team inch closer to breaking the case with help from an eyewitness, while Perry pays Maeve a visit and Robbie puts his plan in motion. Later, Tom follows a lead that takes him down a dangerous path

programme.title: Superbad (2007)
programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill, Michael Cera and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: Zoolander (2001)
programme.desc: Dim male model Derek Zoolander is stunned to find his career going downhill thanks to the arrival of an equally vacuous rival - but fails to realise he is merely a pawn in a dangerous game of international espionage and world domination. Comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Owen Wilson, Will Ferrell, Milla Jovovich, Christine Taylor and David Duchovny

programme.title: National Security (2003)
programme.desc: Two men dismissed from the police become security guards, but are forced to go on the run when they uncover a sophisticated smuggling operation. With the criminal gang and the LAPD both chasing them, the unlikely partners seem more intent on fighting each other than covering their tracks. Action comedy, starring Martin Lawrence, Steve Zahn, Colm Feore and Eric Roberts

programme.title: Mean Machine (2001)
programme.desc: A disgraced soccer star jailed for assaulting two policemen is persuaded by the prison authorities to form a football team of inmates to take on the guards. Unfortunately, whipping his fellow prisoners into shape proves a tricky proposition. Comedy drama, starring Vinnie Jones, Jason Statham, David Hemmings and Jason Flemyng

programme.title: Zoolander (2001)
programme.desc: Dim male model Derek Zoolander is stunned to find his career going downhill thanks to the arrival of an equally vacuous rival - but fails to realise he is merely a pawn in a dangerous game of international espionage and world domination. Comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Owen Wilson, Will Ferrell, Milla Jovovich, Christine Taylor and David Duchovny

programme.title: National Security (2003)
programme.desc: Two men dismissed from the police become security guards, but are forced to go on the run when they uncover a sophisticated smuggling operation. With the criminal gang and the LAPD both chasing them, the unlikely partners seem more intent on fighting each other than covering their tracks. Action comedy, starring Martin Lawrence, Steve Zahn, Colm Feore and Eric Roberts

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: American Pie 2 (2001)
programme.desc: The teenagers reunite after their first year at college to spend the summer at a lake house. Jim is concerned by his lack of sexual experience, and goes in search of an old flame, Oz struggles to keep a long-term relationship going, and Finch tries to master the art of tantric sex. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Biggs, Chris Klein, Seann William Scott, Alyson Hannigan and Eugene Levy

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding (2003)
programme.desc: The friends from East Great Falls High reunite to celebrate Jim and Michelle's forthcoming wedding. Though reluctant to invite Stifler to their big day, the happy couple relent - but regret their decision when he plans a bachelor party on the same evening Jim is due to meet the in-laws. The third instalment in the comedy series, with Jason Biggs, Alyson Hannigan, Seann William Scott, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Eugene Levy

programme.title: Transformers (2007)
programme.desc: Teenager Sam Witwicky is treated to his first car by his dad, but it turns out to be an alien scout with a life of its own. Before long, the vehicle embroils Sam in a long-running intergalactic war between two factions of giant shape-changing robots, which have come to Earth to find a mystical cube that grants infinite power to its possessor. Michael Bay's sci-fi action adventure, inspired by the toy franchise, with Shia LaBeouf, Megan Fox, Josh Duhamel, Jon Voight and John Turturro

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. He joins a fellowship of heroes to embark on a perilous quest to destroy the ring before it falls into the hands of its creator - a dark lord who needs it to regain his power and conquer the world. The first part of Peter Jackson's epic fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkien's novel, starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Viggo Mortensen, Sean Astin, Christopher Lee, Liv Tyler and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Mummy Returns (2001)
programme.desc: Married explorers Rick and Evelyn battle the newly resurrected mummy Imhotep and his ruthless partner, who have captured their son. The undead creature is heading for a confrontation with a legendary ancient warrior - with power over a magical army to be won. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo, Oded Fehr and Patricia Velasquez, with a brief appearance by Dwayne Johnson

programme.title: The Scorpion King (2002)
programme.desc: A ruthless warlord resolves to rid the desert of its few remaining tribes, prompting them to seek the help of a legendary assassin to end the despot's reign of terror by destroying his source of power - a beautiful but deadly sorceress. Fantasy action adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Steven Brand, Kelly Hu and Michael Clarke Duncan

programme.title: Mean Machine (2001)
programme.desc: A disgraced soccer star jailed for assaulting two policemen is persuaded by the prison authorities to form a football team of inmates to take on the guards. Unfortunately, whipping his fellow prisoners into shape proves a tricky proposition. Comedy drama, starring Vinnie Jones, Jason Statham, David Hemmings and Jason Flemyng

programme.title: Role Models (2008)
programme.desc: Two irresponsible salesmen find themselves in trouble with the law after crashing their truck. To avoid jail, they agree to undertake community service looking after a couple of troubled kids. However, it soon seems that going to prison would have been the easier option. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Seann William Scott and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (2003)
programme.desc: A cop's career is seemingly over when he accidentally shoots a hostage while thwarting a bank robbery. He is given the chance to redeem himself by joining an elite unit headed by a veteran sergeant. Their mission is to escort an international crime lord in custody as he is taken to prison. However, they hit a snag when their prisoner offers a multimillion-dollar reward to anyone who breaks him out of jail, placing them under attack from every criminal in the city. Action thriller, starring Samuel L Jackson and Colin Farrell

programme.title: Transformers (2007)
programme.desc: Teenager Sam Witwicky is treated to his first car by his dad, but it turns out to be an alien scout with a life of its own. Before long, the vehicle embroils Sam in a long-running intergalactic war between two factions of giant shape-changing robots, which have come to Earth to find a mystical cube that grants infinite power to its possessor. programme.desc: A ruthless warlord resolves to rid the desert of its few remaining tribes, prompting them to seek the help of a legendary assassin to end the despot's reign of terror by destroying his source of power - a beautiful but deadly sorceress. Fantasy action adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Steven Brand, Kelly Hu and Michael Clarke Duncan

programme.title: Jurassic Park III (2001)
programme.desc: Palaeontologist Dr Alan Grant is lured to a dinosaur-infested island by a divorced couple who offer to fund his research, unaware their real motive is to find their missing son - and that the creatures on the island are far more intelligent than anyone suspected. Action adventure sequel, starring Sam Neill, William H Macy, Tea Leoni and Alessandro Nivola

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefact's twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jackson's fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

Leonidas, fearless king of Sparta, leads 300 of his finest warriors into battle against the vast invading armies of the ruler of the Persian empire. As the outnumbered Spartans fight for their country, his queen, Gorgo, tries to rally support for her husband at home. Fantasy action adventure based on Frank Miller and Lynn Varley's comic-book series, starring Gerard Butler, Lena Headey, Dominic West, David Wenham and Rodrigo Santoro

programme.title: xXx (2002)
programme.desc: Extreme sports star Xander Cage finds himself in trouble when his daredevil exploits land him behind bars. However, he is offered an intriguing escape route, courtesy of National Security Agent Augustus Gibbons - who thinks the adrenaline junkie is the perfect man to bring down a gang of international terrorists in Prague. Action adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Samuel L Jackson, Asia Argento, Marton Csokas and Michael Roof

programme.title: xXx: The Next Level (2005)
programme.desc: The American secretary of defence forms a covert military organisation with the intention of assassinating the president. A government spymaster is ready to foil the plot but, since his top agent is dead, he has to recruit an imprisoned soldier to help him. Action sequel, starring Ice Cube, Samuel L Jackson and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: We Bury the Dead (2024)
programme.desc: When an experimental military weapon accidentally devastates Tasmania, volunteers travel to the island to help authorities identify the dead. Among them is a Ava Newman, who secretly hopes to find her missing husband. However, some of the bodies seem to be returning to life. Horror, starring Daisy Ridley, Brenton Thwaites and Mark Coles Smith

programme.title: Honey Don't (2025)
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans

programme.title: Tafiti - Across The Desert (2025)
programme.desc: A young meerkat's grandpa is bitten by a snake, so he sets off to find a magical flower for the cure. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Cosima Henman, Steve Hudson and Kathleen Renish

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema

programme.title: Tafiti - Across The Desert (2025)
programme.desc: A young meerkat's grandpa is bitten by a snake, so he sets off to find a magical flower for the cure. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Cosima Henman, Steve Hudson and Kathleen Renish

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues (2025)
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addison also star with cameos by Paul McCartney, Elton John and Garth Brooks

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: Don't Let's Go to the Dogs Tonight (2025)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her family's Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali

programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge (2025)
programme.desc: A brilliant cyber-criminal gang evades the police's state-of-the-art surveillance system with a haul worth billions. Retired tracking expert Wong Tak-Chong is ushered back into active service to mentor rookie officer He Qiuguo and build an elite unit to stop the criminals. Action thriller, starring Jackie Chan, Zhang Zifeng and Tony Leung Ka-fai

programme.title: The Real Manhunter
programme.desc: After being picked up by NHS worker Duncan Bone at King's Cross in 1992, Karl Warne and Colin Lockett would murder their host at his flat

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of Richard Chase, the serial killer who took the lives of six victims in one month, and became known to some as the Vampire Killer due to his penchant for cannibalism

programme.title: Murder Uncut
programme.desc: Ashley and her mother Kristine are meeting to co-sign a lease for an apartment, but alarms are raised when Ashley never shows

programme.title: Murders That Shocked the Nation
programme.desc: The presenter explores the crimes of Graham Frederick Young who, after serving 15 years for poisoning his parents, laced an entire factory's tea with deadly thallium

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: British killer Daniel Gonzalez, also known as the Freddy Krueger Killer, who took four lives during a chilling two-day murder spree in 2004 after being inspired by horror films. He eventually commited suicide in his room in Broadmoor Hospital

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: PC Rogers reveals how he and Alsatian Leo help clear the streets of car thieves, and the officer comes up against a man who threatens to shoot him as the Greater Manchester Police dog squad tackles more criminals. A drunk driver takes on PC Greaves and his sidekick Riley, while spaniel Colin - who is trained to deal with explosives - and PC Carlin are put on the front line when a member of the Cabinet arrives in the city. Ken Stott narrates

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness the best and worst behaviour on the nation's busiest motorway

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness the best and worst behaviour on the nation's busiest motorway

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Officers in Wiltshire are out in force on the M4 to track down drug-dealers

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: An adventure centre and a garage are burgled, but the businesses' own cameras do not show the thief's face, with the victims turning to street cameras for help. Plus, a partially blind man is deceived at a cashpoint by an unscrupulous thief. Presented by Dominic Littlewood

The film features an extensive interview with the troubled former footballing superstar, as well as comment from those who admired his skills, including Wayne Rooney, Jose Mourinho and Gazza's ex-England and Tottenham Hotspur team-mate Gary Lineker

programme.title: My Icon

programme.title: Tina (2021)
programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome. Following a prolonged period of ill health, Turner intends to retire from the spotlight with her second husband, Erwin Bach. She bids farewell to her fans in the emotional documentary Tina. Directed by Dan Lindsay and TJ Martin, the film invites the singer to reminisce about her turbulent life and career with glowing contributions from friends, family and fans including Oprah Winfrey and Angela Bassett

programme.title: Pete Doherty: Stranger in My Own Skin

programme.title: Rooted
programme.desc: The arid, rocky terrain in Goegap Nature Reserve burns in the hot African sun. But not everything in the parched landscape is wilted and bleak, on the edge of a rocky outcrop, an enormous tree boasts with large, leathery, heart-shape leaves. Its pale, gnarled, crinkled roots feeling their way across the massive boulders it's perched on, some splitting the rocks in order to find water. This is a Namaqua Rock fig, a tree of myth and fantasy

programme.title: Britannia
programme.desc: Period drama starring David Morrissey. Two years after General Aulus claimed a foothold in Britannia, the romanisation of this savage isle is underway. Meanwhile, an ancient figure could spell doom for the Celtic and Roman alike

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit Inveraray Jail in Argyll and Bute, a 19th-century courthouse and prison reputedly haunted by the lost souls of convicts, vagrants and madmen

programme.title: Bullet Train (2022)
programme.desc: Unlucky US assassin Ladybug is given a simple mission - retrieve a metal briefcase on a high-speed train departing from Tokyo. The pick-up is too easy, but Ladybug discovers that four other killers are on board the same train, and that their missions have something in common. John Wick director David Leitch's comedy thriller, starring Brad Pitt, Joey King, Aaron Taylor-Johnson and Sandra Bullock

programme.title: SAS: Red Notice (2021)
programme.desc: Off-duty SAS soldier Tom Buckingham attempts to thwart a terror attack on a train running through the Channel Tunnel. Despite being injured, Buckingham is the only chance of survival for the passengers. Action thriller based on the novel by Andy McNab, starring Sam Heughan, Ruby Rose, Andy Serkis, Hannah John-Kamen and Tom Hopper

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October (1990)
programme.desc: A Soviet submarine commander creates an international crisis by piloting his experimental nuclear vessel, which is invisible to sonar, toward the American coast. The US and Russian navies think he is planning to attack and set out to destroy the submarine, but a CIA analyst suspects he intends to defect to the West. Cold War thriller, based on Tom Clancy's novel, starring Sean Connery, Alec Baldwin and James Earl Jones

programme.title: Bullet Train (2022)
programme.desc: Unlucky US assassin Ladybug is given a simple mission - retrieve a metal briefcase on a high-speed train departing from Tokyo. The pick-up is too easy, but Ladybug discovers that four other killers are on board the same train, and that their missions have something in common. John Wick director David Leitch's comedy thriller, starring Brad Pitt, Joey King, Aaron Taylor-Johnson and Sandra Bullock

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal (1973)
programme.desc: A group of conspirators contracts the Jackal, a professional hitman, to assassinate President Charles de Gaulle of France. The killer starts to put his painstaking plans into action, creating a new identity, establishing his alibi and commissioning a custom-made weapon, while out-foxing the French police at every turn. Fred Zinnemann's adaptation of Frederick's Forsyth thriller, with Edward Fox, Michael Lonsdale, Alan Badel, Tony Britton and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: Economic unrest ensues after King Leopold cuts off access to the Belgian Congo, so years after leaving his old home behind, Tarzan is lured back from Victorian England hoping to stabilise matters. However, he soon finds he has been lured into a deadly trap orchestrated by one of Leopold's envoys. Adventure, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Margot Robbie and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Bourne Identity (2002)
programme.desc: A fishing boat crew plucks a man out of the sea with two bullet wounds in his back and a safety-deposit number sewn into his skin - but absolutely no memory of who he is or how he got there. In the search for his true identity, he is pursued by assassins - but his skill at evading them suggests his own past is far from straightforward. Thriller, starring Matt Damon, Franka Potente, Chris Cooper, Clive Owen and Brian Cox

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside town's tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chief's efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielberg's blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy (2004)
programme.desc: The amnesiac assassin is living quietly in hiding, until his former employers come after him again and murder his girlfriend. A CIA operation has ended in disaster, and those responsible intend to clear their names by implicating Bourne. As the former secret agent tries to evade the hitmen on his trail, he also struggles to piece together the truth about his past. Action thriller sequel, starring Matt Damon, Brian Cox, Joan Allen and Julia Stiles

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy (2012)
programme.desc: The leaders of a secret government agency plan to eliminate several agents as part of a cover-up when they face having their dark secrets exposed. One of the targets is able to evade his fate and go on the run - but his escape is threatened by his dependence on drugs to boost his physical and mental capabilities. Spy thriller sequel, with Jeremy Renner, Rachel Weisz and Edward Norton

programme.title: Logan's Run (1976)
programme.desc: In a hedonistic futuristic city, euthanasia is compulsory for everyone over 30. A law enforcer whose job is to kill anyone who tries to escape is given the task of exposing an underground movement. To do so, his body clock is fast-forwarded, giving him a taste of life on the run. Sci-fi thriller, starring Michael York, Jenny Agutter, Farrah Fawcett and Peter Ustinov

programme.title: The Radleys (2024)
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary family hide a dark secret, but eventually parents Helen and Peter are forced to confront who they are, with the help of Peter's twin brother, Will. Director Euros Lyn's horror comedy co-written by Jo Brand, starring Kelly Macdonald, Damian Lewis and Sophia Di Martino

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: The Bourne Identity (2002)
programme.desc: A fishing boat crew plucks a man out of the sea with two bullet wounds in his back and a safety-deposit number sewn into his skin - but absolutely no memory of who he is or how he got there. In the search for his true identity, he is pursued by assassins - but his skill at evading them suggests his own past is far from straightforward. Thriller, starring Matt Damon, Franka Potente, Chris Cooper, Clive Owen and Brian Cox

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy (2004)
programme.desc: The amnesiac assassin is living quietly in hiding, until his former employers come after him again and murder his girlfriend. A CIA operation has ended in disaster, and those responsible intend to clear their names by implicating Bourne. As the former secret agent tries to evade the hitmen on his trail, he also struggles to piece together the truth about his past. Action thriller sequel, starring Matt Damon, Brian Cox, Joan Allen and Julia Stiles

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bourne's long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Meanwhile, a ruthless CIA director becomes convinced Bourne is still a security risk, and plans to dispose of him once and for all. Third instalment of the spy thriller series, directed by Paul Greengrass and starring Matt Damon, Joan Allen, Julia Stiles, David Strathairn, Paddy Considine, Scott Glenn and Albert Finney

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy (2012)
programme.desc: The leaders of a secret government agency plan to eliminate several agents as part of a cover-up when they face having their dark secrets exposed. One of the targets is able to evade his fate and go on the run - but his escape is threatened by his dependence on drugs to boost his physical and mental capabilities. The local police chief's efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielberg's blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielberg's action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot is framed for the murder of starving civilians - and ends up being forced to take part in a brutal TV game show in which a succession of gadget-wielding killers hunt him on the streets of Los Angeles. Sci-fi action adventure inspired by a Stephen King story, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Yaphet Kotto, Maria Conchita Alonso and Richard Dawson

programme.desc: Chef Niall Ó Conchúir heads down to Wicklow on a chilly winter's morning to meet Hilda Crampton on her organic farm in Castleruddery. She has an array of wonderful seasonal produce. Niall settles on some leeks and conjures up a plate of them cooked in cider served on a bed of braised lentils - comfort food for a dark and damp winter evening at its simplest. Meanwhile, back in the kitchen, Rebecca Uí Chonaola gets to grips with some beetroot and puts together a terrine with some home-made tofu cheese. She also makes a crispy strudel with shredded celeriac, which she serves up with a simple green olive sauce

programme.title: Storyville
programme.desc: The world couldn't keep its eyes off figure skaters Nancy Kerrigan and Tonya Harding at the 1994 Winter Games. Just weeks before the contest, Kerrigan was injured by an unknown assailant. Harding's ex-husband had plotted the attack with his misfit friends to eliminate Kerrigan from the competition. Now more than two decades late, this documentary takes a fresh look at the scandal that elevated the popularity of professional figure skating and has Harding still facing questions over what she knew when she knew it

programme.desc: Sheldon's grandmother, known as Meemaw, arrives in Pasadena to visit, but his excitement at her arrival quickly gives way to discomfort when she clashes with Amy. Meanwhile, Raj finds himself drawn to an ambitious female screenwriter he meets at the comic-book store, but Bernadette angrily reminds him he already has a girlfriend. Comedy, guest starring June Squibb

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy host a Valentine's Day episode of Fun with Flags, while Leonard and Penny grapple with getting older. Elsewhere, Howard and Bernadette discover a surprise in their hot tub, and Raj is torn between Emily and a girl he met at the comic book store. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the friends find out about Bernadette's big news, they celebrate by getting together for an evening of karaoke. However, Bernadette is upset when Howard freaks out over her announcement as he becomes convinced that he needs to start earning more money. Comedy, Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the 200th episode of the comedy, the gang finally celebrates Sheldon's birthday after more than nine years together, with the help of a few special guests. Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with guest appearances from Adam West, Wil Wheaton and Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard face problems when they file for a patent for their infinite persistence gyroscope. Plus, Penny, Amy and Bernadette give Raj dating advice when Emily reaches out to him after their breakup. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike is frustrated when Molly suggests they should write their own wedding vows, prompting Carl to come up with an interesting approach to the task. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Peggy leaves her dog for Mike and Molly to look after while she goes out of town, saying it will be good practice for when they have children. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The couple are left without a wedding chapel when Molly's attitude upsets a priest. Comedy drama, starring Melissa McCarthy and Billy Gardell

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Bible Camp and a Chariot of Love
programme.desc: The youngster finds himself in a fierce competition with Paige when their mothers force them to attend Vacation Bible School. George is furious after Georgie makes a questionable purchase. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Musty Crypt and a Stick to Pee On
programme.desc: Dale and Meemaw work out their relationship issues while playing Dungeons and Dragons with Sheldon and Missy. Mary and George take a trip with Coach Wilkins and his wife, and Georgie is alarmed to learn his girlfriend thinks she's pregnant. Iain Armitage stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Freshman Orientation and the Invention of the Zipper
programme.desc: College orientation does not go as Sheldon planned. Mary is invited to a party when she's mistaken for a university student, while George Sr helps Pastor Jeff set up a children's nursery. Comedy prequel to The Big Bang Theory, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is shocked at a revelation from Sheldon after she buys him a new laptop, while Raj sells out Leonard and Howard after they lie to their wives in order to attend an early screening of a movie. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: On a weekend cabin trip with Penny and Amy, Sheldon spills one of Leonard's secrets, while Howard and Bernadette must draw a line when Raj goes overboard with pregnancy gifts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon disagree over whether to continue holding their regular Roommate Agreement meetings, with Leonard suggesting they are no longer required, while Sheldon believes they are still essential. As the pair's squabble quickly escalates into a full-blown argument, the rest of their friends turn up for a planned Game of Thrones viewing party, and end up taking sides in the dispute - resulting in two warring factions taking up residence in 4A and 4B. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang goes to a bar and runs into Penny's old boyfriend Zack, while Bernadette is left to spend the evening with Sheldon when she cannot go wine tasting with the others. Elsewhere, things do not go to plan when Raj introduces his new girlfriend, Claire. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon discovers a surprise screening of The Avengers is scheduled at a local cinema, complete with a Q&A session with the film's director, Joss Whedon. However, the event just happens to clash with time he'd planned to spend with Amy, so he decides to pay Stuart to be his subtitute for the afternoon while he and the other boys immerse themselves in Marvel superheroics. Meanwhile, Leonard's mother Beverly arrives in town for an extended visit, and Penny takes the opportunity to bond with her new mother-in-law - and to make up for not inviting her to the wedding. Comedy, guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Conflict arises when Leonard's newly divorced parents and Sheldon's devoutly religious mother are all in town at the same time. And when Howard and Raj are contacted about the guidance system they've developed, they assume that the government is out to get them. Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends struggle through an awkward morning after Sheldon's mother and Leonard's father share an evening together. Penny's family arrives in town to attend Penny and Leonard's second wedding ceremony. Keith Carradine, Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the US air force's department of material command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues (2013)
programme.desc: Arrogant newsreader Ron Burgundy's career is rescued from a drunken slump by an executive for a new 24-hour news channel. Reassembling his team of sidekicks, he swiftly rises from the network's graveyard to become its biggest star with a run of ludicrously sensationalist broadcasts. Comedy sequel, starring Will Ferrell, Christina Applegate, Paul Rudd and Steve Carell

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out

programme.sub-title: The Wind Beneath My Nose Bumps
programme.desc: Elaine calls the growth on her love handle her third breast, Jessica's cyst is close to her eye and could be dangerous for Dr Lee to remove

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper

programme.title: My 600lb Life

programme.title: Mary Millington: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair (1979)
programme.desc: A seductive astrologer's carefree life is brought crashing to a halt when he is accused of robbery and cannot win over the only person able to provide an alibi. He faces a possibly greater challenge in providing a woman who has never had an orgasm with the satisfaction she has long been deprived of. Sex comedy, starring Alan Lake and Diana Dors

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The island is rocked when Saint Marie's governor Caroline Bamber drops dead at her leaving party, with the commissioner standing right next to her. As DI Goodman and the team try to deduce how she could have been poisoned without their boss noticing any foul play, they find themselves entering the murky world of island politics, where blackmail, threats and corruption seem commonplace - fuelled by ongoing tension between the French and British. Meanwhile, Humphrey braves the world of online dating, under the guidance of ladies' man Dwayne - and soon finds his perfect match. Lucy Cohu and Nigel Lindsay guest star

programme.desc: Charlie and Rex investigate a fairytale-turned-nightmare when a princess performer suspiciously dies at a child's birthday party

programme.desc: When his neighbour finds a lost letter and believes it heralds a future crime, Murdoch is dismissive until she uncovers a potential recipient who might be the intended victim

programme.sub-title: The Boys Are Back in Town
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is Canada's answer to Sherlock Holmes in the mystery series set in 19th-century Toronto. Murdoch investigates an explosion in the morgue as a private citizen while he and the other officers fight to reopen the station house against the mayor's orders

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The disappearance of a federal judge's daughter on the same day as her grandmother dies leads the team to the family's guarded home, where security officers insist the girl never left the property. Convinced she was murdered, Jane searches for the body and concludes the victim was placed in her relative's coffin - prompting him to test his theory on the day of the funeral. Crime drama, starring Simon Baker

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are in grave danger as they find themselves captives of a kidnapper seeking vengeance

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al investigate the murder of an ironworker on a building site, and the victim's reputation is put in jeopardy when a possible connection to a robbery ring and gangsters is uncovered. As the case unfolds, the duo uncover corruption in the construction industry, but Carrie encounters danger as she gets close to the truth

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A fashion show takes a chilling turn when young model Zoe Mackay is strangled just moments after leaving the catwalk, and while the crew and other models come under suspicion, they all have watertight alibis. To make matters worse, there are no witnesses or DNA evidence, the only clue being a single stocking clasped in the victim's hand. What does it mean - and how was her killer able to strike without being spotted? Meanwhile, Florence tries to help Humphrey improve his social skills with the opposite sex, and JP recognises one of the models as a school crush on at school. But will she remember him?

programme.desc: Dwayne attends the funeral of local barber Cedrik Verga and shortly after is puzzled to receive a message from beyond the grave - a text from the deceased claiming 'I was murdered'. Given that his phone was in the coffin, is this a sick prank or something altogether more sinister? Humphrey agrees to investigate, and they soon find evidence to rule out his death from natural causes. Meanwhile, Humphrey demonstrates his culinary skills to Florence and the rest of the team

But when she becomes the only witness to a fellow tourist's death - seemingly thrown from his hotel balcony in the middle of the night- she finds herself slap bang in the middle of a murder investigation. Meanwhile, JP takes relationship advice from Humphrey after confessing his feelings for Rosey - leaving him more confused than ever. Wendy Craig, Keith Allen and Susie Amy guest star in the island whodunit

programme.desc: David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by radio presenter Sara Cox, comedian Jason Manford, journalist Nick Robinson and actor Harry Shearer, who aim to help the team captains deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.desc: The comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to dissect the week's news - with a panel of guests on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade focuses on technology for protection and security, making sure the Gadget Man house is kitted out with a smartphone-activated lock, scanning visitors with a portable metal detector and putting a robot on patrol. He is joined by actor Keith Allen to test a wallet tracker, a vest that makes the wearer look more muscular and a bulletproof bag, and also meets up with comedian Bill Bailey at a Cold War era nuclear bunker in Essex to try out a post-apocalyptic survival kit - much of which can also be used for camping holidays or festivals

programme.desc: A man fears for his life after being stopped by a cartel in Laredo, clubbers in Detroit are found with drugs disguised in liquid, and officers stop a shipment of frozen rats

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Border officers in Detroit apprehend a woman after finding a handgun and ammunition in her vehicle, and officers in Eagle Pass find $150,000-worth of methamphetamine

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: A massive mega-truck creates a monster problem that could drive the team into the abyss, and Shaun and Sarah call in heavyweight help in a quest to unearth buried treasure

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the state of Rajasthan, a land of palaces and hilltop forts, where he cooks a biryani fit for a royal banquet. programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.desc: Lucy Beaumont, Shazia Mirza, Joe Thomas and Jake Wood test their general knowledge skills in the hope of winning a prize

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels from Texas to southern Mexico, meeting a woman who risks her life to take supplies to migrants stranded on the Mexican side of the border in Reynosa, one of the country's most violent cities, which is dominated by a powerful criminal organisation. He also ventures into the rainforest to explore the Maya city of Yaxchilan, and meets the modern-day descendants of this civilisation, who are increasingly marginalised and treated as second-class citizens

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson pits the Audi RS6 against its rival, the Mercedes E55 AMG, the engineers from Lotus are faced with the challenge of turning an old Lada into a top-notch machine and the Maserati 4200 GT is put through its paces. Plus, a bunch of white van drivers battle it out on the test track, and Michael Gambon is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Rick Parfitt of Status Quo joins Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and Jason Dawe as they show off the Peugeot RC concept car and enter a lively debate about transport and the environment. Plus, the team test-drives the Maserati 4200 GT, while vicars, rabbis and mullahs take to the track to prove which faith moves fastest

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate Britain's taste for exotic food, one of the driving forces of its culinary history. They prepare chilli gingerbread and demonstrate how to make perfect sushi, travel to Tatton Park in Cheshire to learn why pineapples were once extremely expensive and reveal the history of the Onion Johnnie Man

programme.desc: Officers at Eagle Pass intercept a driver smuggling narcotics over the border, and a group of passengers in Laredo refuse to admit to owning an air compressor full of rifles

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: A trawler demolition bites back for Team Salvage as a five-metre-long crocodile patrols the area, and Shaun and Sarah dig deep as a wreck on the beach pushes them to the edge

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef visits a five-star hotel in Madurai, Tamil Nadu, employing local housewives for genuine home-cooked dishes and samples chettinad chicken, a dish inspired by spices brought back from both East and West by merchants. In Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, he meets India's first MasterChef winner, and marks the end of his culinary journey with a small gathering of friends at his bungalow to reveal the outcome of his search for the perfect curry

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by actors Kevin Bishop and Brian Blessed, comedian Josh Widdicombe and historian Kate Williams, who aim to help the team captains deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Host Rob Brydon and team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack return with previously unseen material from the latest run of the comedy panel show. Featuring appearances by guests including David Baddiel, Ed Balls, Jo Brand, Steve Davis, Susie Dent, Ade Edmondson, Sheila Hancock, Stephen Mangan, Bob Mortimer, Ore Oduba, Anita Rani, Fay Ripley, Stacey Solomon, Jordan Stephens, Claudia Winkleman and Kimberly Wyatt

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Lucy Beaumont, Shazia Mirza, Joe Thomas and Jake Wood test their general knowledge skills in the hope of winning a prize

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across Central America, from the Caribbean to the Pacific. Along the way, he goes diving on a coral reef on the coast of Belize, and witnesses a gun battle between park rangers and intruders in Chiquibul National Park. He also discovers how climate change has left Guatemala devastated by famine and drought, reports on measures to curb gang violence in El Salvador, and learns how Costa Rica aims to become the world's first carbon neutral country by 2021

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and Jason Dawe take a look at family cars. Jeremy shakes up the school run with a Volvo XC90 and the radical Renault Espace, Richard road-tests an interesting alternative to the usual estate, the Subaru Forester, and Jason presents a second-hand buyer's guide to one of the cleverest MPVs around, the Vauxhall Zafira. Meanwhile, the storming Volkswagen Golf R32 becomes the latest power car to take on the Top Gear test track. Chef Gordon Ramsay is the star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson goes off-road as he test-drives the Range Rover, while the Lotus Esprit is put through its paces on the test track. Plus, a student's beloved Metro receives a new look and the winner of the reasonably priced car competition is announced. With Richard Hammond and Jason Dawe

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the history of the potato, preparing a Lancashire potato and butter pie and a chicken casserole and cobbler to show it at its best. They see how British vodka made out of the vegetable is winning global awards and reflect on a dark time in Welsh history when the chip shops almost ran out of chips

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey's son Garth falls in love with Dorien's visiting niece Rosa, but things go wrong when a furious Dorien decides to meddle in their relationship

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy is inspired by the sight of a sailboarder slicing through water, and tries to create a sailboard big enough for him and his two friends to stand on. Brian Wilde stars

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy ropes Compo and Clegg into reconstructing a battle when a pit at a building site brings back memories of his wartime exploits. Comedy, starring Brain Wilde and Peter Sallis

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo, Clegg and Foggy are pleased when a stranger gives them an old van, but little do they realise what is inside it. Long-running comedy, starring Peter Sallis

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Suspicions are aroused when the holiest house in Kembleford is linked to the death of a wanton woman. Drama, starring Mark Williams and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Trapped and desperate, Bergerac must negotiate for his life while still drawing together the threads of the mystery. Meanwhile, Nigel has a surprise for Charlie

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team reinvestigates the murder of a man found in an alleyway seven years previously when he is identified on a website covering unexplained disappearances. The victim is named by a woman whose husband hired him six months before his death, but neither of them had thought anything of it when their employee went missing - and seem to know little about him. Meanwhile, Brian and Gerry are distracted by looming job cuts and fear that Ucos could be downsized. With Robert Daws and Claudie Blakley

programme.title: Dalziel & Pascoe
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The apparently motiveless murder of an American tourist found battered to death brings Dalziel back in contact with an old flame. Evidence leads the detective duo to a rough pub just outside Thorpburgh, where they discover a photograph of the murdered woman pictured with two soldiers. David Soul, Phyllis Logan and Lee Boardman guest star

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: When a man who arranged to meet Lovejoy at the local cricket game dies suddenly, it falls to the antiques dealer to find the fortune that was promised to the widow. The unusual legacy includes a forged snuff box. Ian McShane stars

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Trapped and desperate, Bergerac must negotiate for his life while still drawing together the threads of the mystery. Meanwhile, Nigel has a surprise for Charlie

programme.title: Fred Dibnah's Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: The former steeplejack explores the achievements of Britain's civil engineering pioneers, visiting the Channel Tunnel, Humber Bridge and Pontcysyllte Aqueduct. He also has a go at legging a narrowboat through a canal tunnel in Dudley in the West Midlands

programme.title: Fred Dibnah's Magnificent Monuments

programme.desc: An examination of the dark history behind Britain's fascination with murder, beginning with historian and curator Lucy Worsley exploring how notorious killings were transformed into popular entertainment in the first half of the 19th century

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Motorhoming with Merton & Webster
programme.desc: Paul Merton and Suki Webster explore the New Forest, encountering 'commoners' Tess and Ollie, who have earned the right for their ponies to roam freely in the area. With the help of farrier Ben, Suki learns how to remove a horseshoe and takes home her own bit of luck, and the couple visit hives in Hythe for a spot of beekeeping

programme.title: Motorhoming with Merton & Webster
programme.desc: Paul Merton and Suki Webster explore Devon, beginning by heading to Dartmoor national park to meet a local guide for a Sherlock Holmes-themed tour, as It was in the national park that Arthur Conan Doyle was inspired to write The Hound of the Baskervilles. Paul and Suki also meet Kate and Norman, who are part of the Wheeled Access group, which encourages anyone with a disability to get out and enjoy the area

programme.title: Motorhoming with Merton & Webster
programme.desc: Paul Merton and Suki Webster explore Snowdonia and pitch up at Lake Bala, where they meet a couple who have converted an old horsebox into a family-sized motorhome. Paul and Sue sample some of the many watersports available, starting with paddle boarding and ending with a little synchronised swimming. The following day they're off to the Mach Loop valley - a famous flight path for the RAF fighter pilot training at nearby Anglesey

programme.title: Motorhoming with Merton & Webster
programme.desc: Paul Merton and his wife Suki Webster explore Yorkshire. They tour around a brewery in Masham, and stay at the famous Tan Hill Inn, where they dine in their own private dome. Next day there's a sheep dog-training session, lessons in railway signals, and a visit to the spectacular Ribblehead Viaduct

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright loses his trousers on the way to the wedding of Nurse Gladys Emmanuel's niece, and ends up having to borrow a pair of her trousers to wear at the event

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: An old woman wanders into Lucy's flat and joins Lee on the sofa, but it becomes apparent that she is very confused. He decides to throw her out - only to discover she has a wealthy son who always pays a handsome reward to the person who takes her home. Comedy, starring Lee Mack

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: In a desperate bid to prove his manliness, the happy-go-lucky Lee embarks on a camping trip with the object of his affections Lucy, his best mate Tim and his partner Daisy, but the spooky forest where they have chosen to pitch their tents could prove a little too intimidating for him to handle. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Tim Vine, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy has her god-daughter dumped on her overnight, which wouldn't be so bad except the girl's stay coincides with her birthday - leaving the inexperienced guardian and her flatmate Lee struggling to come up with appropriate entertainment for a bunch of excited nine-year-olds. Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star, with a guest appearance by Paul Kaye (Game of Thrones)

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: The staff are called to stand in for Mr Partridge as children's entertainers - much to their dismay. But all is not lost when Ted and Spike see a tramp keeping the kids on the beach amused and believe he may be the answer to all their problems

programme.title: Don't Wait Up
programme.desc: Toby asks Angela to join him on a romantic break, but she is not too keen on discovering who sponsored the weekend. Nigel Havers and Tony Britton star

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Diane puts her trust in Kath, sending her on a covert mission to Martin's office while she reluctantly accompanies her spouse to a dinner party at Sandy Cooper's home. In a desperate attempt to address his financial woes, Martin tries to impress Sandy and Vinnie Hayes to secure the treasury job and get his hands on the Rotary Club float. Comedy written by and starring Sian Gibson, with Conleth Hill and Rosie Cavaliero

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: It's the big day for Kath and Diane as they attempt to finally exact their revenge on Martin. However, while Diane has never felt more alive, Kath seems to be having second thoughts. Comedy, written by and starring Sian Gibson, with Rosie Cavaliero, Conleth Hill, Sheila Reid and Steve Pemberton

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: When Tony's brother and his girlfriend pay a visit, their behaviour almost drives Gary to murder. However, when he finds out her parents have a holiday villa, the prospect of a free holiday soon changes his behaviour. Bachelor comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Neil Morrissey

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright loses his trousers on the way to the wedding of Nurse Gladys Emmanuel's niece, and ends up having to borrow a pair of her trousers to wear at the event

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: An old woman wanders into Lucy's flat and joins Lee on the sofa, but it becomes apparent that she is very confused. He decides to throw her out - only to discover she has a wealthy son who always pays a handsome reward to the person who takes her home. Comedy, starring Lee Mack

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee is looking forward to a lazy weekend when his dad turns up on the doorstep, looking for somewhere to stay having just come out of hospital - and in need of someone to care for him. Bobby Ball guest stars, with Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: A 20-year-old woman turns up on Lee's doorstep asking to borrow a cup of sugar. However, she has an ulterior motive - young Debbie believes Lee may be her father. After a period of denial, he remembers a one-night stand from a celebratory party thrown by Tim at the end of his accountancy exams in the 1980s. Sitcom, starring Lee Mack, Tim Vine and Sally Bretton

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Diane puts her trust in Kath, sending her on a covert mission to Martin's office while she reluctantly accompanies her spouse to a dinner party at Sandy Cooper's home. In a desperate attempt to address his financial woes, Martin tries to impress Sandy and Vinnie Hayes to secure the treasury job and get his hands on the Rotary Club float. Comedy written by and starring Sian Gibson, with Conleth Hill and Rosie Cavaliero

programme.title: Black Ops
programme.desc: Police community support officers Dom and Kay are tasked to infiltrate a predominantly black gang of villains. Working undercover, the pair are unwittingly thrust into the murky world of deep cover infiltration as they pose as disgruntled former officers within a powerful criminal enterprise, with the motiviations of the DI who sent them in becoming increasingly unclear. Comedy, starring Gbemisola Ikumelo and Hammed Animashaun

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot and Gary get serious over a chess contest in which the victor gains an evening of pleasure. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: The inmates are shocked to discover there is a thief in their midst, so Fletcher decides to stage a mock trial to bring the culprit to justice with the help of Slade's resident legal consultant Judge Rawley. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker, Richard Beckinsale and Maurice Denham

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: A visit to a local country mansion reveals Boycie's admiration for the long-established tradition of respect for the gentry. Elgin moves into Bryan's caravan after being thrown out by his wife, leading to relentless gossiping by Mrs Cakeworthy. When the mobile home burns down Marlene offers the two men a place to stay, much to her husband's chagrin. John Challis and Sue Holderness star

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: After complaining about their long wait for lunch in the canteen, the staff are told to take over the kitchens themselves - but when they arrive for their shift, they find the area unhygienic. Comedy, starring Mollie Sugden, John Inman and Frank Thornton

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy persuades Clegg and Compo that starting a dog-walking business will be no work at all since they are already going on daily countryside rambles. However, the experience proves to be more of a workout than the trio envisage. Brian Wilde, Peter Sallis and Bill Owen star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy, Clegg and Compo hit on a solution to their transport problems - building their own bikes. Meanwhile, Sid and Ivy's cafe has been redecorated and is set for its grand re-opening. Comedy, starring Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Brian Wilde

programme.title: Dad's Army
programme.desc: Mainwaring and his platoon set up an observation post in the local lighthouse, but manage to annoy ARP warden Hodges by inadvertently flooding the whole town with light during an air raid. Comedy first shown in 1970, starring Arthur Lowe and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: Open All Hours: Inside Out
programme.desc: Diane Morgan narrates this special documentary about the much-loved comedy, featuring contributions from Sir David Jason, Johnny Vegas, Tim Healy, Ronnie Barker's daughter Charlotte, and more

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Gastric spends the night at Madge's house, but has he found the path to her best bedroom? Granville takes delivery of a bargain consignment from Spain, not knowing exactly what is in the very large crate. Eric and Cyril have a fall out over a lost compass, while Mr Newbold falls in and gets a soaking on a boat trip with Mrs Rossi. The canny grocer has his work cut out getting friends to make up and getting a wet customer home without being spotted by 'Black Widow' Mrs Featherstone. Comedy, starring David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Sue Holderness

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy commits a minor indiscretion while drunk, but claims to have no memory of the event. Determined to get to the bottom of the affair, she and Lee embark on an ambitious quest to discover the truth about whether it is possible to retain their memories of a heavy night of drinking - making use of liberal amounts of home-made potato hooch. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville creates a special blend of snuff, but will his customers notice any beneficial effects? The ladies get dressed up for line-dancing, while Gastric is prompted to go on a diet. A furtive Mr Newbold thinks he's found a pastime to share with Mrs Rossi - away from the prying eyes of Mrs Featherstone. However, a determined Black Widow enlists assistance from Granville and Leroy for a crash-course in how to ride a bicycle. David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Maggie Ollerenshaw star

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright expands his empire by opening a mobile shop in a bid to impress Nurse Gladys Emmanuel, but the enterprise is cut short by a close encounter with some perishables

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: Frank looks back on his glory days in the 1980s and reflects on his choices. As the facts about the robbery become clearer, Haines and Selforth find an eager new partner in Diane. Shanthi and Jerzy turn against Rani, inadvertently offering an opportunity to the local drug boss. Greg must go above and beyond the call of duty to help his new friends out - whether he wants to or not

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: The staff are called to stand in for Mr Partridge as children's entertainers - much to their dismay. But all is not lost when Ted and Spike see a tramp keeping the kids on the beach amused and believe he may be the answer to all their problems

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: It's the big day for Kath and Diane as they attempt to finally exact their revenge on Martin. However, while Diane has never felt more alive, Kath seems to be having second thoughts. Comedy, written by and starring Sian Gibson, with Rosie Cavaliero, Conleth Hill, Sheila Reid and Steve Pemberton

programme.desc: When Tony's brother and his girlfriend pay a visit, their behaviour almost drives Gary to murder. However, when he finds out her parents have a holiday villa, the prospect of a free holiday soon changes his behaviour. Bachelor comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Neil Morrissey
